summary: Repeated request—frustration with unfulfilled save instruction.
detailed_context: Dominic asked to save content to knowledge base and Obsidian at least twice (first Evernote, then Obsidian), and is now repeating the request verbatim. The previous AI response delivered a substantive company verification report, but the user's follow-up indicates he wants the content saved as a concrete action—not just delivered as text. The repetition signals clear frustration that the instruction hasn't been executed. This is a terse redirect/repeated request pattern (rating 2-3 range).
